feedback.text: Hello. I write to you other fourths who are closing down video games to which they have sold, I feel unpressed by buying games online, as I cannot know that the product I buy is also my, it did not seem to me that one cannot own what you buy when it is not advertised as a license, but that the publisher is listening and saying that it is your own product. This is a very deep and lucky Pandora box, which can be opened if nothing is done, so I am writing to you in the hope that we can avoid feeling unprinted when buying digital games. Welcome Mathias Hald Svendsen.
